channel.title: LaTeX on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in LaTeX on upyesp

item.title: Install Manim On Windows 10 & Windows 11
item.description: Manim is a Python based tool that creates animations of math and technical concepts.

item.title: LaTeX & KaTeX Math Rendering: The Double Backslash \\ in Markdown
item.description: The double backslash, ‘\\’, when specified in math formula in LaTeX and KaTeX might not render correctly. Here’s how to avoid that.
